title: delphinium phrygium subsp. thessalonicum
intro: Delphinium phrygium subsp. thessalonicum, also known as Delphinium thessalonicum, is a plant species within the family Ranunculaceae, characterized by its tall stature and showy flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Delphinium thessalonicum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a dried herb, tincture, or infused in tea, and is traditionally consumed for its medicinal properties.
